# Harshita Collection

> Harshita Collection is an Indian boutique offering hand-crafted traditional wear for women — suits, kurtis, sarees, dupattas, and festive ensembles, with complimentary shipping across India.

## Pages

- [Home](/): The Monsoon Edit, featured collections, and best sellers.
- [New Arrivals](/category/new-arrivals): Latest hand-stitched arrivals this season.
- [Suits](/category/suits): Hand-embroidered Indian suits.
- [Kurtis](/category/kurtis): Everyday and occasion kurtis.
- [Kurti Pant Sets](/category/kurti-pant-sets): Coordinated kurti and pant sets.
- [Sarees](/category/sarees): Banarasi, silk, and contemporary sarees.
- [Dupattas](/category/dupattas): Hand-finished dupattas and stoles.
- [Trousers](/category/trousers): Tailored trousers and palazzos.
- [Festive Collection](/category/festive-collection): Wedding and festival wear.
- [Best Sellers](/category/best-sellers): Most-loved pieces by our patrons.
- [Search](/search): Search the catalogue.
